description:
# Project Page Hub (Frontend)

Surface the unified project data on the project page: timeline/activity feed, artifact viewer for ceremonies and changelogs, and webhook settings UI.

## Phases
1. Project timeline feed component + artifact viewer
2. Per-project Discord webhook settings UI
title: [Epic] Project Page Hub (Frontend)
